title: Episode 1
summary:
思源 frantically searches for his homework assignment that's due today. He looks everywhere in his bedroom but can't find it. Panicking, he asks 思琪 for help. Together they retrace his steps from yesterday afternoon - checking the living room where he had a snack, the dining room where the family ate dinner, and even the backyard where he played with his toy car. 思琪 teaches him that being organized is important and helps him develop a system.

Finally, 南珍 calls from the kitchen - she found the homework papers mixed in with yesterday's newspapers that she was about to recycle. 思源 is so relieved and grateful. 南珍 gently reminds him that everything needs its proper place. 思琪 suggests they make a special homework folder and designate one spot on the dining table as 思源's "homework corner."

The episode ends with 思源 happily putting his completed homework in his new folder and placing it in his backpack right away. He promises to always put his homework in the same place from now on. The gentle lesson reinforces the importance of organization, responsibility, and the value of family members helping each other solve problems.

title: Episode 2
summary:
明浩 wakes up early on Saturday morning with a secret plan - today is 佳敏's birthday, but she doesn't know the family is planning a surprise party. He recruits 思源 and 思琪 to help keep their mother busy and distracted while 南珍 prepares her famous birthday noodles in the kitchen. The challenge? 佳敏 is very observant and always seems to know when something is going on.

Throughout the morning, the children try various tactics to keep 佳敏 away from the kitchen. 思源 asks her to help find his toy in the backyard, while 思琪 requests help choosing an outfit in her bedroom. Each time 佳敏 starts walking toward the kitchen, someone jumps in with a new distraction. The comedy builds as the children's excuses become more creative and slightly ridiculous. Meanwhile, 南珍 is cooking up a storm, and delicious smells start filling the house, making it harder to keep the secret.

Just when 佳敏 is getting suspicious and insists on going to the kitchen, the family yells 'surprise!' She walks in to find a beautiful setup with decorations, her favorite noodles, and a homemade birthday card from both children. 佳敏 is moved to tears, revealing she actually knew something was up but played along because she loved seeing her family work together. The episode teaches that sometimes the effort and love behind a surprise is more important than keeping it perfectly secret, and that family teamwork creates the best memories.

title: Episode 3
summary:
思源 comes home from school excited because his class is having a talent show next week, and he really wants to participate. The problem? He doesn't think he has any special talents. He watches 思琪 play beautiful music on her phone and feels discouraged. 明浩 comes home from work and finds 思源 sitting sadly in the living room. When 思源 explains his worry, 明浩 decides to help him discover his hidden talent.

明浩 takes 思源 around the house trying different activities. First, they go to the backyard where 明浩 tries to teach him to juggle (disaster - balls everywhere!). Then to the kitchen where they attempt to make shapes with dough (messy but not quite talent-show worthy). 思源 gets more frustrated with each failed attempt. Just when he's about to give up, 明浩 tells one of his famous dad jokes, and 思源 naturally responds by making everyone laugh with his own funny observations and silly faces. 思琪 walks by and says 思源 has always been the family comedian who can cheer everyone up.

明浩 has an idea - 思源's talent is making people happy and laugh! They practice a simple comedy routine together with 思源 telling kid-friendly jokes and doing funny impressions of family members (including 明浩's exaggerated dad jokes). By the end, 思源 realizes that talents come in many forms, and making people smile is just as valuable as any other skill. The episode teaches that everyone has unique gifts, sometimes we just need help from family to recognize them, and that bringing joy to others is a wonderful talent.

title: Episode 4
summary:
思琪 is studying hard for an important exam in her bedroom when 思源 keeps interrupting her with questions, requests to play, and random observations. At first, 思琪 tries to be patient and answers him kindly, but after the fifth interruption, she loses her temper and yells at him to leave her alone. 思源's feelings are hurt, and he runs to the backyard where 南珍 finds him looking sad. He tells 南珍 that 思琪 doesn't love him anymore and never wants to play. 南珍 gently explains that sometimes people need quiet time to focus, and that doesn't mean they don't care - it just means they need space right now.

南珍 takes 思源 to the kitchen and gives him a special task: helping her make 思琪's favorite dumplings as a surprise study snack. While they work together, 南珍 teaches 思源 about timing and consideration - how showing love sometimes means being quiet and giving people what they need, not just what we want to give. 思源 learns to recognize when someone is busy and practices being patient. Meanwhile, 思琪 feels guilty about yelling and realizes she could have explained her needs better instead of just getting angry.

Later, 思源 quietly brings the plate of dumplings to 思琪's room and whispers that he's sorry for bothering her, and that 南珍 helped him make her favorite snack. 思琪 is touched and apologizes too for yelling, explaining that she was stressed but that wasn't an excuse to be mean. They agree on a signal system: when 思琪's door is half-closed, it means she needs quiet time, but when it's open, 思源 is always welcome. The episode teaches about respecting boundaries, communicating needs clearly, apologizing when wrong, and finding compromises that work for everyone in the family.

title: Episode 5
summary:
思源 discovers a small stray kitten in the backyard one afternoon and immediately falls in love with it. He sneaks it inside to his bedroom, planning to keep it as a secret pet. He names it 小花 (Little Flower) and uses his allowance money to buy cat food at the market. For two days, he manages to hide the kitten, making excuses about why he needs to stay in his room so much. However, 南珍 starts noticing strange things - mysterious meowing sounds, missing food from the kitchen, and 思源 acting very secretive.

When 南珍 finally discovers the kitten in 思源's room, she sits down with him to have a serious talk. 思源 is afraid she'll make him get rid of 小花, but 南珍 gently explains that keeping secrets and hiding things is not the right way to handle important decisions. She tells him that pets are a big responsibility that the whole family needs to discuss together. They need to consider if everyone has time to help care for it, if anyone is allergic, and what the family rules about pets should be. 思源 realizes he should have asked first instead of hiding the kitten.

南珍 calls a family meeting in the living room where everyone gathers to meet 小花 and discuss what to do. 明浩 and 佳敏 explain that while they appreciate 思源's kind heart for helping the stray kitten, big decisions like getting a pet need family agreement. Together, they create a responsibility chart showing who will feed, clean, and care for the kitten. Everyone agrees to keep 小花, but only after 思源 understands that honesty and asking permission are important values. The episode teaches that even when we want something very badly, we should communicate openly with family rather than keeping secrets, and that responsibility is something we share together.
